generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder attached to the crane boom measuring swing angle of the miniature payload"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring ambient wind speed near the gantry crane prototype"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

// C2: Acting components
instance CraneDriveMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Linear/rotary drive motor of the lab‑scale gantry crane, commanded via the on‑board controller"
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (data transmitted)
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

// C10: Data objects
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped swing angle values streamed from the SwingAngleEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerMosquitto, TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped wind speed measurements streamed from the Anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerMosquitto, TimescaleDBDatabase
]

// C11: Enablers (software infrastructure)
instance MQTTBrokerMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker used for real‑time publish/subscribe of sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService,
               HistoricalLoggingService,
               RealTimeVisualizationService,
               ContinuousValidationService,
               SimulationService,
               TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database storing all sensor and actuator records"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalLoggingService,
               ContinuousValidationService,
               SimulationService,
               TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CADSoftwareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open‑source CAD toolchain providing geometric model files to twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService,
               SimulationService
]

instance KinematicEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kinematic modelling library used to compute crane motion and validate predictions"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService,
               SimulationService,
               OptimalControlService
]

// C10: Models
instance CADGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed CAD geometry of the lab‑scale gantry crane (beams, motor mounts, rails)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADSoftwareEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model describing the positions, velocities and constraints of the crane payload"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicEngineEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal motion commands for the crane based on current state and target positions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that continuously writes time‑stamped sensor and actuator data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that renders live crane operation using CAD geometry and incoming sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares live sensor data against predictions from the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationResultInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs forward simulations of crane motion using the CAD and kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedMotionInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates feasible crane trajectories for new loading tasks"
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateTrajectoryAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance OptimizedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized motion trajectory calculated by the OptimalControlService"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to archived sensor and actuator records stored in TimescaleDB"
]

instance RealTimeOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visual representation of crane position and payload swing"
]

instance ValidationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of continuous validation indicating deviation between measured and modelled behavior"
]

instance PredictedMotionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future crane motion generated by the SimulationService"
]

// C17: Actions
instance GenerateTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic creation of a new crane trajectory based on task specifications"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C15: Environment (optional grouping)
instance GantryCraneLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder,
               Anemometer,
               CraneDriveMotor,
               CADGeometricModel,
               KinematicModel,
               MQTTBrokerMosquitto,
               TimescaleDBDatabase,
               OptimalControlService,
               HistoricalLoggingService,
               RealTimeVisualizationService,
               ContinuousValidationService,
               SimulationService,
               TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application (and optionally by the Trajectory Generator Service) and sent via the Physical Crane Interface to the motor controllers of the crane. Commands are issued as Python API calls over the same network used by the interface; execution is performed by the motor controllers driving the cart and hoist. Confirmation of command execution is logged by the Logging Application. Authentication, validation, or conflict‑resolution mechanisms are not described in the documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows a container‑based, event‑driven constellation. Each functional element is modeled as a C4‑container (not a Docker container) that must be present for operation. The MQTT broker acts as the integration backbone, routing messages between the Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation and the Human‑Machine Interface. Persistent state is stored in a TimescaleDB instance, which is read by the Logging Application, Dashboard and Validation Service. The Dashboard (Grafana) visualises data from the database in real time. The Trajectory Generator uses a kinematics model to compute swing‑free trajectories, which are fed to the Simulation Service and, after execution, to the Validation Service that compares measured versus simulated trajectories and raises alerts via the Dashboard. Resource management relies on the shared database and broker, and the overall coordination is orchestrated through MQTT topics and periodic polling of the database."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The exemplar provides a continuous validation service that compares the kinematic model against observed crane behavior to detect model drift and faults. Validation and fault‑detection methods have been demonstrated in research papers using this setup, and the DarTwin notation has been applied for model evolution. Quantitative fidelity thresholds, uncertainty quantification, and detailed QA processes are not explicitly described."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system’s software components are packaged as Docker containers (TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, Grafana dashboard) and orchestrated with Docker‑Compose on a single host PC. Communication between services uses MQTT (publish/subscribe) for signaling and standard TCP/IP for database access (SQL) and HTTP for Grafana. No explicit bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols are specified in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components run on‑premise on a personal computer. Docker containers host the database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; the remaining Python services are installed via the pip‑installable gantrylib module. Computational needs are modest (single‑core CPU, modest RAM) and storage is provided by TimescaleDB. Deployment is performed with a single docker‑compose command, enabling start/stop of the containerised services. No cloud or edge platform is used, and scalability mechanisms are not described in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external components is realised through a Python‑based Physical Crane Interface that communicates with the crane controllers (protocol unspecified) and publishes state updates to the MQTT broker. All twin services consume these MQTT messages and write measurements to TimescaleDB. The Dashboard accesses the database via Grafana’s data source plugins (SQL/Timescale). No enterprise‑level standards such as OPC UA or AutomationML are used in this exemplar; the only explicit protocol is MQTT for inter‑service signaling, and the system relies on open‑source tools (TimescaleDB, Grafana, Python) for data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adopts the AutomationML standard for its digital‑twin model representation, ensuring model‑driven interoperability. No other industry certifications or standards are mentioned for the exemplars."
]
